code_dossier.name: PermissionServiceAPI.java
code_dossier.description: Permission service API interface definition that provides user permission query and verification capabilities for the account management system. It serves as a service contract for RPC/Feign remote calls.

data.detailed_description:
PermissionServiceAPI is a core service interface definition in the account management system, located in the account-api module. This interface defines the permission service contract, following a typical microservice API-first design pattern.

The interface provides two essential permission-related operations:
1. **getUserPermission**: Retrieves all permissions associated with a specific user based on their userId. Returns a Set of permission strings, enabling bulk permission queries for authorization scenarios.
2. **hasPermission**: Checks whether a specific user has a particular permission. This is a fine-grained permission verification method suitable for single permission checks in access control logic.

The interface follows request-response pattern using dedicated DTO classes (GetUserPermissionRequest/Response, HasPermissionRequest/Response), which provides good extensibility and backward compatibility. The response DTOs extend BaseResponse, indicating a standardized response structure across the system.

This API interface is typically exposed via RPC frameworks like Dubbo or Feign for inter-service communication, allowing other microservices to query and verify user permissions without direct database access.
responsibilities: Define the service contract for permission-related operations in the account management system
Provide user permission query capability through getUserPermission method
Provide permission verification capability through hasPermission method
Serve as the API definition for RPC/Feign remote service calls
Establish a clear boundary between permission service provider and consumers

interfaces.name: getUserPermission

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: Request object containing userId to query permissions for

interfaces.description: Retrieves all permissions associated with a specific user. Returns a set of permission strings representing the user's granted permissions.

interfaces.name: hasPermission

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: Request object containing userId and the specific permission to check

interfaces.description: Checks whether a specific user has a particular permission. Returns a boolean result indicating permission status.
